items.title: S01E01 - An Echo of Bugles
items.summary: A swaggering gunfighter targets an aging Confederate veteran, and Colton steps in to deal with the bully.

infolabels.title: An Echo of Bugles
infolabels.plot: A swaggering gunfighter targets an aging Confederate veteran, and Colton steps in to deal with the bully.

items.title: S01E02 - The Vespers
items.summary: Sworn to avenge his brother's death, a hoodlum comes gunning for a small town's local minister. When Colton arrives to warn his old friend and ex-soldier, he finds the man unwilling to resort to violence to protect himself and his pregnant wife.

infolabels.title: The Vespers
infolabels.plot: Sworn to avenge his brother's death, a hoodlum comes gunning for a small town's local minister. When Colton arrives to warn his old friend and ex-soldier, he finds the man unwilling to resort to violence to protect himself and his pregnant wife.

items.title: S01E03 - The Lonely Galico Queen
items.summary: A dance hall girl mistakes Colton for her mail-order bridegroom.

infolabels.title: The Lonely Galico Queen
infolabels.plot: A dance hall girl mistakes Colton for her mail-order bridegroom.

items.title: S01E04 - The Kingdom of McComb
items.summary: Unable to perform the deed themselves, a group of religious colonists attempt to recruit Colton to kill a powerful landowner trying to evict them.

infolabels.title: The Kingdom of McComb
infolabels.plot: Unable to perform the deed themselves, a group of religious colonists attempt to recruit Colton to kill a powerful landowner trying to evict them.

items.title: S01E05 - One of the Wounded
items.summary: Colton tries to help a Union army veteran left mute and immobile by the psychological horrors of war.

infolabels.title: One of the Wounded
infolabels.plot: Colton tries to help a Union army veteran left mute and immobile by the psychological horrors of war.

items.title: S01E06 - The Flight of the Artic Tern
items.summary: Colton becomes involved in a romantic triangle when he saves a friend's bride-to-be from a runaway horse.

infolabels.title: The Flight of the Artic Tern
infolabels.plot: Colton becomes involved in a romantic triangle when he saves a friend's bride-to-be from a runaway horse.

items.title: S01E07 - Widow on the Evening Stage
items.summary: Following the murder of a man during an Indian attack, Colton witnesses a town's prejudice towards the man's Indian widow.

infolabels.title: Widow on the Evening Stage
infolabels.plot: Following the murder of a man during an Indian attack, Colton witnesses a town's prejudice towards the man's Indian widow.

items.title: S01E08 - The House Rules at Mrs. Wayne's
items.summary: While trying to defend his wife's honor, a friend of Colton is killed... and Colton is torn between seeking justice and keeping his word to turn the other cheek.

infolabels.title: The House Rules at Mrs. Wayne's
infolabels.plot: While trying to defend his wife's honor, a friend of Colton is killed... and Colton is torn between seeking justice and keeping his word to turn the other cheek.

items.title: S01E09 - The Sheriff of Fetterman's Crossing
items.summary: Colton has second thoughts after accepting the position of deputy to the dubious sheriff of a sleepy Montana town.

infolabels.title: The Sheriff of Fetterman's Crossing
infolabels.plot: Colton has second thoughts after accepting the position of deputy to the dubious sheriff of a sleepy Montana town.

items.title: S01E10 - The Homecoming of Lemuel Stove
items.summary: Colton befriends a Union soldier who returns from war to find that his father has been lynched by bigots.

infolabels.title: The Homecoming of Lemuel Stove
infolabels.plot: Colton befriends a Union soldier who returns from war to find that his father has been lynched by bigots.

items.title: S01E11 - Westward, the Shoemaker
items.summary: When a well-intentioned immigrant is stripped of his nest egg in a rigged card game, Colton takes on the con artist.

infolabels.title: Westward, the Shoemaker
infolabels.plot: When a well-intentioned immigrant is stripped of his nest egg in a rigged card game, Colton takes on the con artist.

items.title: S01E12 - The Oath
items.summary: When a doctor proves to be as full of whiskey as he is of self-pity, Colton must perform an emergency appendectomy on a young gunfighter.

infolabels.title: The Oath
infolabels.plot: When a doctor proves to be as full of whiskey as he is of self-pity, Colton must perform an emergency appendectomy on a young gunfighter.

items.title: S01E13 - Hunt the Man Down
items.summary: Colton is drafted to help a posse hunt down a seemingly harmless recluse.

infolabels.title: Hunt the Man Down
infolabels.plot: Colton is drafted to help a posse hunt down a seemingly harmless recluse.

items.title: S01E14 - Escort for a Dead Man
items.summary: A man who deserted from the Army wants Colton to escort him back to his fort.

infolabels.title: Escort for a Dead Man
infolabels.plot: A man who deserted from the Army wants Colton to escort him back to his fort.

items.title: S01E15 - The Ordeal of Bud Windom
items.summary: A murder suspect's son makes life difficult for Colton when the boy tries to clear his father's name.

infolabels.title: The Ordeal of Bud Windom
infolabels.plot: A murder suspect's son makes life difficult for Colton when the boy tries to clear his father's name.

items.title: S01E16 - To the West of Eden
items.summary: While traveling across the desert to deliver horses to their new owner, Colton reluctantly agrees to escort a young woman across the arid land.

infolabels.title: To the West of Eden
infolabels.plot: While traveling across the desert to deliver horses to their new owner, Colton reluctantly agrees to escort a young woman across the arid land.

items.title: S01E17 - Mantrap
items.summary: Colton becomes the target of an assassin when he is the sole witness to a robbery and murder.

infolabels.title: Mantrap
infolabels.plot: Colton becomes the target of an assassin when he is the sole witness to a robbery and murder.

items.title: S01E18 - A Little Stroll to the End of the Line
items.summary: Colton neither likes nor respects the man he has been deputized to protect: a rabble-rousing preacher who fears death from an ex-convict.

infolabels.title: A Little Stroll to the End of the Line
infolabels.plot: Colton neither likes nor respects the man he has been deputized to protect: a rabble-rousing preacher who fears death from an ex-convict.

items.title: S01E19 - The Trial in Paradise
items.summary: Colton provides the defense in a kangaroo court trial of a former Union Army officer.

infolabels.title: The Trial in Paradise
infolabels.plot: Colton provides the defense in a kangaroo court trial of a former Union Army officer.

items.title: S01E20 - A Question of Guilt
items.summary: In the darkness Colton kills an intruder, and discovers the man is an Army Lieutenant.

infolabels.title: A Question of Guilt
infolabels.plot: In the darkness Colton kills an intruder, and discovers the man is an Army Lieutenant.

items.title: S01E21 - The Mourners for Johnny Sharp (1)
items.summary: While a young gunman lies dying in a cave, a ruthless man waits outside hoping to get his hands on the boy's loot. (Part 1 of 2)

infolabels.title: The Mourners for Johnny Sharp (1)
infolabels.plot: While a young gunman lies dying in a cave, a ruthless man waits outside hoping to get his hands on the boy's loot. (Part 1 of 2)

items.title: S01E22 - The Mourners for Johnny Sharp (2)
items.summary: Following the late Johnny Sharp's instructions, Colton arranges for the four people closest to the gunman to meet at the undertaker's parlor. (Part 2 of 2)

infolabels.title: The Mourners for Johnny Sharp (2)
infolabels.plot: Following the late Johnny Sharp's instructions, Colton arranges for the four people closest to the gunman to meet at the undertaker's parlor. (Part 2 of 2)

items.title: S01E24 - Pick Me Another Time to Die
items.summary: Colton is accused of slaying a sheriff.

infolabels.title: Pick Me Another Time to Die
infolabels.plot: Colton is accused of slaying a sheriff.

items.title: S01E25 - The Burden of the Badge
items.summary: A group of reformed criminals deputize Colton to defend and protect them.

infolabels.title: The Burden of the Badge
infolabels.plot: A group of reformed criminals deputize Colton to defend and protect them.

items.title: S01E26 - To Hang a Dead Man
items.summary: Colton joins a sheriff in search of a town's destroyers.
